narrative_summary: Four iceberg candidates detected within the Grand Banks AOI under typical North Atlantic spring conditions. Elevated navigational risk for commercial traffic along the primary shipping lane.
recommended_actions: Reduce speed to minimum safe maneuvering speed.
Post additional ice watch on bridge wings.
Notify MCTS of iceberg cluster positions.
Consider routing 20 NM south of the primary detection cluster.
assumptions_and_limitations: Demo mode — deterministic report (no live LLM).
